title: glaucium insigne
intro: Glaucium insigne, also known as the Naked Poppy or Insigne Poppy, is a flowering plant in the poppy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating pain and inflammation, due to the presence of alkaloids such as glaucine. The health benefits of Glaucium insigne include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a sedative. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
